title: Battalion Hotfix & Platform Auth Alignment
content:
Resolved login failures on Battalion and aligned credentials across the platform identity layers.

What changed and changed back:

  • Environment Flag Reversion: Temporarily switched the live Battalion backend NODE_ENV to production to debug session cookie behavior. This caused cross-origin Secure cookie warnings on HTTP, so the environment was returned back to development.
  • Codebase Sync: Synchronized the latest monorepo client/backend files from the network share to the live server at E:\battalion, resolving out-of-sync built asset mismatches.
  • Identity Alignment: Renamed the primary administrative account in the central auth system (auth.jeffersonwm.com) from admin to wm and updated the password to match the unified platform credentials (aligning it with the Battalion direct user) without displaying plain-text keys in public feeds.
